perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a middle-aged male creator (Tim-ge) wearing a red t-shirt, black cap, and glasses, speaking directly to the camera against a blurred background. (2) Transitions to a Tesla event showroom with high-contrast purple and white neon lighting; a silver Tesla vehicle is showcased on a stage with a large 'TESLA' logo. (3) Shots of an outdoor crowd gathered near a Tesla 'SALES & SERVICE' sign, followed by close-ups of a grey Tesla Model Y's sleek front and rear light bar during the unveiling. (4) Footage displays Tesla Supercharger units and Powerwall equipment in a clean, gallery-like setting. (5) The creator demonstrates his Apple Watch to the camera. (6) Industrial footage of a Tesla factory featuring heavy machinery and robotic arms lifting large car components. (7) Final close-up shots of the car's wheels with 'MICHELIN PILOT SPORT' branding and the rear charging port area.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy male vocals begin immediately with an upbeat, fast-tempo electronic BGM in the background. (2) Soundscape shifts to include ambient event noise such as cheering, clapping, and the muffled sound of a presenter on a stage PA system. (3) Music maintains a steady rhythm while the primary male narrator provides a continuous, fast-paced commentary in Mandarin. (4) Specific SFX are used for emphasis, including a 'ping' sound when tech icons appear and a mechanical whirring sound during the factory footage. (5) The audio concludes with a smooth fade-out of the music as the narrator's tone remains enthusiastic and inviting.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the spoken Mandarin narration throughout the video. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: Titles such as 'Tesla Model Y launch party' and '全新版的 Model Y' appear with glowing effects. (3) Hook Text: '充電速度更快' (Faster charging speed) and '90秒的影片' (90-second video) are used to highlight key selling points and contest rules. (4) Brand Text: 'MICHELIN PILOT SPORT' and 'Tesla' are visible on the products.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Event Highlights -> Product Feature Breakdown -> Promotional Contest Details -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tim-ge), several secondary influencers mentioned (Old Dad, Rocca, Mrs. West US), and a crowd of approximately 10+ attendees at the event.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Asian male, short hair, wearing a black newsboy cap, rectangular glasses, a vibrant red t-shirt, and a wireless microphone clipped to his collar.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A mix of a minimalist studio for talking heads, a high-tech Tesla showroom with neon accents, a busy street corner with a large Tesla sign, and an industrial car manufacturing plant.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Mixed: Studio lighting, dramatic neon stage lighting, and natural daylight.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To generate excitement and provide first-hand coverage of the new Tesla Model Y launch in Taiwan. The video serves as both a brief tech review and a promotional tool to encourage viewers to participate in a contest and watch longer content about Tesla's manufacturing process.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct presentation of product features, usage of brand logos, and reporting on a specific corporate event.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Tim-ge's signature cap and enthusiastic greeting, high-density text overlays typical of Taiwanese tech creators.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses fast-paced editing and multi-scene transitions to keep the viewer engaged in a mobile-first short-form format.
